abilities.name: 프렌드가드
abilities.description: 같은 편의 데미지를 줄일 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.
The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.
